title: System Chat LLM error handling improvements
notes:
- System Chat now shows specific error messages for 402/401/429/503/timeout/missing binary
- Empty LLM response now shows actionable message instead of silent failure
- Calendar console docstring update

title: Switch to free OpenRouter model; enhanced LLM error logging
notes:
- OPENAI_MODEL changed to google/gemma-3-4b-it:free (working free OpenRouter model)
- _ask_openai now catches HTTPError explicitly and logs HTTP status + response body (up to 300 chars)
- Fixes 402 Payment Required on every LLM call caused by auto model picking paid models with no credits

title: Fix raw HTTP 402 error leaked through picoclaw rc=0 stdout path
notes:
- Added _raise_if_http_error() helper in bot_llm.py
- _ask_picoclaw now detects HTTP error patterns in stdout even when picoclaw exits rc=0
- Also improves rc!=0 path: error text parsed for 402/429/401/503 patterns; full text included in RuntimeError message
- System Chat and exception handler in bot_handlers.py correctly intercepts all these errors with user-friendly messages

title: System Chat HTTP error handling + LLM fallback on 402/429/503
notes:
- ask_llm_or_raise() now tries local llama.cpp fallback before raising (Feature 3.2)
- System Chat shows user-friendly messages for HTTP 402/401/429/503 errors
- Raw urllib.error.HTTPError strings no longer shown to users

title: System Chat error messages fix + T26 regression guard
notes:
- Fixed _SPINNER_RE stripping ASCII hyphen from bash commands (ls -la, df -h, etc.)
- Added ask_llm_or_raise() to bot_llm.py for strict LLM failure handling
- System Chat now shows specific error: timeout / binary not found / LLM error text
- Added T26 regression test t_system_chat_clean_output (3 sub-tests)

title: Copilot optimization complete (§20)
notes:
- All quick-win Copilot optimization proposals P-1..P-9 complete
- P-1: safe-update applyTo narrowed to specific files only
- P-6: bot-deploy and safe-update instructions shortened, point to skills
- P-7: accounting task moved from INSTRUCTIONS.md to concept/
- P-9: #file: anchor pattern added to copilot-skills-guide.md
- Updated implementation tracker in concept/copilot_optimization.md
- P-5 (bot_web.py split) explicitly deferred to standalone sprint

title: Local LLM Fallback — Admin Panel toggle (§3.2 complete)
notes:
- Admin Panel: 🤖 Switch LLM → 📡 Local Fallback shows ON/OFF status and toggle button
- Toggle writes/removes ~/.picoclaw/llm_fallback_enabled flag file — no restart needed
- Fallback state survives bot restarts (LLM_LOCAL_FALLBACK env var OR flag file)
- Displays configured llama.cpp URL and model in the menu

title: Logging & Monitoring (§6.1)
notes:
- Structured category loggers: assistant.log, security.log, voice.log, datastore.log
- Admin panel: 📊 Logs button with live tail (last 50 lines) per category
- Telegram alert handler: CRITICAL/ERROR events forwarded to admins automatically
- Logrotate drop-in config for all 5 log files (daily, 7 days, compress, copytruncate)

title: Fix System Chat LLM routing
notes:
- Fixed: System Chat returned 'Could not generate a command' for any input — it was calling the picoclaw CLI binary directly instead of routing through the configured LLM_PROVIDER (openai/OpenRouter)
- System Chat now uses ask_llm() like all other LLM-powered features, so the active provider and model are respected

title: Fix LLM model selection, update OpenAI catalog
notes:
- Fixed: selecting an OpenAI/OpenRouter model via Admin LLM menu now actually takes effect (was always using OPENAI_MODEL env var)
- Fixed: model selection checkmark (is_current) now correctly compares against full model ID (e.g. openai/gpt-4.1)
- Fixed: callback_data now sends full OpenRouter model slug (openai/gpt-4.1) instead of short name
- Updated OpenAI catalog: added gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-4.1-nano, o3, o4-mini; removed deprecated gpt-4.5-preview

title: Fix LLM provider (OpenRouter direct), voice mode routing, import error
notes:
- Fixed: LLM calls failed with picoclaw rc=1 because picoclaw-gateway service crash-loops (Error: no channels enabled) — switched to LLM_PROVIDER=openai pointing at OpenRouter's OpenAI-compatible endpoint
- Fixed: voice messages during contact_add / contact_edit / contact_search modes were silently handed to LLM instead of the contact handler — STT transcript was discarded, contact was never saved
- Fixed: voice messages during cal_edit_title / cal_edit_dt / cal_edit_remind modes were also ignored — calendar field edits via voice now work
- Fixed: NameError ACTIVE_MODEL_FILE not defined in bot_admin.py — constant was used in _set_active_model() but missing from the import block

title: Fix empty-note crashes; /status shows LLM provider
notes:
- Fixed: opening, editing, appending, or replacing an empty note crashed with ApiTelegramException: Bad Request: message text is empty
- Root cause: _handle_note_raw and _start_note_edit/append/replace used text/lines[0] without guarding for empty string
- Fix: note display falls back to localized note_empty_body string; lines[0] access guarded with if lines else ''
- /status command now shows LLM_PROVIDER prefix before active model name (e.g. picoclaw > gpt-4o-mini)

title: Fix calendar: Russian time idioms and partial ISO dt
notes:
- Fixed: Add Event returned 'Could not parse date' for Russian shorthand like 'Тренировка в 19'
- Root cause 1: event_parse prompt had no rules for 'в X' (at X o'clock) or time-of-day words (утром/вечером)
- Root cause 2: LLMs sometimes return partial ISO 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH' instead of 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM' — fromisoformat() fails on Python <3.11
- Fix 1: added prompt rules — 'в X' = X:00, утром=09:00, днём=13:00, вечером=19:00, в полдень=12:00
- Fix 2: defensive dt_str normalization in _finish_cal_add() pads 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH' to 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:00'

title: Fix free chat: picoclaw 402 error leaked as reply
notes:
- Fixed: free chat showed raw picoclaw error log (HTTP 402 / OpenRouter out of credits) as bot reply
- Root cause 1: _ask_picoclaw() in bot_llm.py logged warning on rc!=0 but still returned cleaned output instead of raising
- Root cause 2: _LOG_PREFIX regex didn't match compact date format YYYYMMDD HH:MM:SS used by picoclaw — log lines passed through cleanup unchanged
- Fix: raise RuntimeError on non-zero picoclaw exit code — ask_llm() catches it, returns empty — user sees user-friendly error message
- Fix: extended _LOG_PREFIX regex to also match YYYYMMDD (no separator) date format

title: Fix calendar LLM call — use ask_llm
notes:
- Fixed: calendar NL input returned 'no LLM response' error
- Root cause: bot_calendar.py used old _ask_picoclaw (bot_access) with short timeouts (20-30s) and outdated output cleaner missing agent|json pipe format
- Fix: migrated all 4 calendar LLM calls to ask_llm (bot_llm) with 60s timeout, proper error logging, and correct output cleaning

title: Prompt templates centralised + LLM params configurable
notes:
- All LLM prompts extracted to src/prompts.json
- New core/bot_prompts.py loader with fmt_prompt() helper
- LLM tuning params (temperature, max_tokens) configurable via env vars
- bot_config.py: YANDEXGPT_TEMPERATURE, YANDEXGPT_MAX_TOKENS, ANTHROPIC_MAX_TOKENS, LOCAL_MAX_TOKENS, LOCAL_TEMPERATURE

title: Fix Telegram-Web account link codes
notes:
- Fixed HTTP 500 on /register when entering a Telegram link code
- Root cause: link codes were stored per-process in memory; web service never saw codes generated by Telegram service
- Fix: codes now persisted to ~/.picoclaw/web_link_codes.json, shared between both services

title: Multi-LLM Provider Support & Local Fallback
notes:
- Feature 3.1: LLM_PROVIDER env-var switch (picoclaw/openai/yandexgpt/gemini/anthropic/local) — set in ~/.picoclaw/bot.env
- Feature 3.2: Local llama.cpp offline fallback with LLM_LOCAL_FALLBACK=1 and picoclaw-llm.service systemd unit
- Fallback responses labelled with warning prefix

title: Bug fixes 0.7 and 0.8
notes:
- Bug 0.7: Contact add/edit cancel button was showing 'btn_cancel' instead of translated text — added missing btn_cancel i18n key to ru/en/de
- Bug 0.8: Profile change password failed with 'could not change password' — fixed account['id'] key error (correct key is 'user_id')

title: Contact Book (Feature 4.0)
notes:
- Add, view, edit and delete contacts via Telegram bot
- Search contacts by name, phone or email
- Web UI at /contacts with two-panel layout (search + list + form)
- 38 new i18n strings (ru/en/de)

title: System Chat role guards (Bug 0.6)
notes:
- Admin role limited to read-only commands (cat, ls, journalctl, systemctl status, etc.)
- New Developer role (DEVELOPER_USERS env var) allows service control and file writes
- Commands not on any allowlist are blocked before execution
- Confirm gate always required for all system commands
- _classify_cmd_class() added to bot_security; _is_developer() added to bot_access

title: Identity silo fix: unified Telegram+Web user identity
notes:
- Fixed: Telegram and Web now share a single user identity
- Web UUID and Telegram int chat_id unified under shared profile key
- Calendar, Notes, and Profile data now visible across both channels
- _resolve_storage_id() ensures consistent file-based storage resolution

title: Unified Chat+Voice mode
notes:
- Removed separate Voice Session button from main menu
- Free Chat now handles both text and voice messages in one mode
- Chat welcome message now shows voice availability (Russian only, Vosk + Piper TTS)
- Simplified menu: fewer buttons, same functionality

title: Calendar console voice fix
notes:
- Fixed: voice messages in calendar console mode were routed to general LLM instead of calendar handler
- Voice commands like 'add meeting at 9' now correctly add events via calendar console
- Bug 0.5: security preamble no longer blocks calendar add-event intent

title: Multilingual support: Russian, English, German (DE)
notes:
- German (de) language support added for all bot functions
- Language auto-detected from Telegram user language_code
- German TTS: Piper de_DE-thorsten-medium.onnx
- German STT: Vosk vosk-model-small-de
- All 115 UI strings translated to German
- Calendar, voice, notes, mail — all support German

title: Calendar: multi-event, NL query, delete confirmation, console mode
notes:
- Multi-event parsing: one message can add multiple events — each confirmed individually with Save / Skip / Save All
- NL query: ask "что у меня завтра?", "события на следующей неделе" — filtered results shown instantly
- Delete confirmation: calendar events now require confirmation before deletion
- Calendar console mode: free-form text commands (add/query/edit/delete) routed by LLM intent classification
- All calendar mutations require explicit user confirmation

title: System chat emoji fix + TTS chunk delivery fix + timing debug opt
notes:
- Fixed critical regex typo in system chat: emoji filter was also stripping letter F from all bash commands
- Hardened _extract_bash_cmd: bracket-wrapped emoji, prose sentence rejection, ASCII first-word check
- Defense-in-depth: command is re-sanitized immediately before bash -c execution
- System prompt now explicitly forbids emojis and decorative characters in LLM responses
- Fixed TTS multi-chunk labeling: chunk label now uses actual sent counter, not raw index - failed chunks no longer produce misleading (2/2) with missing (1/2)
- Added voice_timing_debug toggle to Voice Opts admin menu (previously only via VOICE_TIMING_DEBUG env var)

title: Send as email from Notes, Digest, and Calendar
notes:
- Notes, Mail Digest, and Calendar events now have a Send as email button
- First send: bot asks for recipient address and stores it per user
- Subsequent sends use the stored address (change option always available)
- Sends via SMTP over SSL using the configured mail App Password
- Supports Gmail, Yandex, Mail.ru, and custom IMAP/SMTP providers

title: Calendar: confirmation step + full event editing
notes:
- Confirmation card shown before saving a new event: review title, date/time and reminder offset
- From confirmation: edit title, date/time (re-parsed via LLM) or reminder minutes
- Event detail view: Edit title / Reschedule (new date/time) / Edit reminder
- Reminder timer is automatically rescheduled when an event is edited
- reminded flag reset on edit so the reminder fires again at the new time

title: Enhanced user registration: name input + full identity in admin
notes:
- New users are asked to enter their name before registration is submitted
- Admin approval notification shows Telegram first/last name, @username, and user-entered name
- All admin user panels (list, pending, remove) show full identity info for each user
- Approve/block confirmations include the user's entered name
- registrations.json now stores first_name and last_name alongside username and name

title: Notes UX: in-place edit, raw text view, read aloud
notes:
- Note edit: current content shown via ForceReply — edit directly in Telegram input bar without rewriting from scratch
- Raw text view: new Raw text button shows note body without Markdown rendering (useful for copying raw content)
- Read aloud: new Read aloud button synthesises note body via Piper TTS and sends as a voice message with note title as caption
- Voice input during note creation and edit flows is routed into the note state machine instead of going to the LLM
- Note open keyboard: Edit / Delete / Raw text / Read aloud / All Notes / Menu

title: §5.3 Voice pipeline improvements as optional toggles
notes:
- VAD pre-filter (webrtcvad): removes non-speech frames before Vosk — toggle: vad_prefilter
- Whisper STT (whisper.cpp): use tiny model instead of Vosk — toggle: whisper_stt (needs binary + model)
- Piper low model (ru_RU-irina-low.onnx): faster TTS synthesis — toggle: piper_low_model (needs model)
- Persistent Piper keepalive: holds ONNX in page cache between calls — toggle: persistent_piper
- All 4 opts default OFF — existing behaviour unchanged
- New opts visible in Admin → ⚡ Voice Opts menu

title: Notes System — create, list, edit, delete + voice dictation & read
notes:
- New 📝 Notes menu (Full + Admin roles) with Create / List / Open / Edit / Delete
- Notes stored as Markdown files in ~/.picoclaw/notes/<chat_id>/
- Voice dictation: say "запиши заметку …" / "create note …" to save a voice note
- Voice read: say "прочитай заметку …" / "read note …" to hear a note via TTS
- All notes UI localised in Russian and English via strings.json

title: Fix admin menu Markdown parse failures (5 handlers)
notes:
- Voice Opts menu: escape status strings containing underscores (e.g. warm_piper) — was silently failing
- Switch LLM confirm: removed parse_mode=Markdown with italic markers — was crashing silently
- LLM menu + OpenAI sub-menu: plain-text output + try/except on all send calls
- Pending Requests: escape user-supplied username/name through _escape_md() — any _ in a username broke the entire menu
- All 5 admin handlers now have try/except with plain-text fallback

title: Fix: Release Notes button in admin changelog menu
notes:
- _handle_admin_changelog: added try/except around Markdown send + plain-text fallback
- Previously: button press triggered a Markdown parse exception that was swallowed — button appeared to do nothing
- Admin → Changelog now reliably shows the full version history

title: RC1 — User Registration Workflow + Full Feature Overview
notes:
🎉 Release Candidate 1 — first officially tagged release.

NEW in this version (TODO §1.1 — User Registration Workflow):
- Unknown users who send /start now enter a registration flow
- Registration stored in registrations.json: pending / approved / blocked
- Admins receive inline-button notification for every new request
- Approve → user added as guest and notified immediately
- Block → user marked blocked with polite decline message
- Admin panel: new Pending Requests button with live count badge
- Blocked users see declined message on /start; pending users see waiting message

All available features:
- Gmail digest (inbox + spam, last 24h, LLM-summarised)
- Free Chat via picoclaw agent
- System Chat: describe task, LLM generates bash command, confirm and run
- Voice Session: Telegram voice note → Vosk STT → picoclaw LLM → Piper TTS
- LLM switcher: OpenRouter (default), OpenAI GPT-4o/mini/o3-mini/o1/gpt-4.5
- Voice pipeline opts: silence strip, 8kHz STT, warm Piper, parallel TTS, Piper ONNX in RAM
- Auto-detect question language (Cyrillic=Russian, Latin=English)
- Role system: Admin / Full / Guest with role-specific menus
- /status: per-service status, active LLM, user role
- Admin deploy notifications on every version bump
- Orphaned TTS message cleanup on restart
- User Registration Workflow (this version)

Git commits in this RC:
663a133 feat: User Registration Workflow (v2026.3.15-rc1)
61fd8c4 Restructure TODO.md
4e5c71b v2026.3.14 — Piper ONNX in RAM (tmpfs_model)
a448a4c v2026.3.12 — Fix stuck Generating audio
3a545de v2026.3.11 — TTS_MAX_CHARS 200-600
21832a2 v2026.3.10 — Auto-detect question language
4064a85 v2026.3.9  — Fix picoclaw output
5fc4336 v2026.3.8  — Language enforcement + TTS emoji fix
a74a27b v2026.3.7  — Release notes system
4d20006             Voice pipeline optimizations
e53bf78 v2026.3.6  — OpenAI ChatGPT sub-menu
7c836a7             /status service diagnostics
3c505fd             Role-based help variants

Tag: v2026.3.15-rc1

title: Voice opt: Piper model in RAM (tmpfs)
notes:
- New voice opt: 'Piper model in RAM (/dev/shm)'
- Copies 66 MB Piper ONNX model to /dev/shm/piper/ on enable
- TTS and warm-up use RAM path (~10x faster reads vs microSD)
- Auto-restores RAM copy on bot restart if opt is enabled
- Background copy with status message; auto-disables on copy failure

title: Improve STT: audio enhancement + confidence filtering
notes:
- ffmpeg: always apply highpass=f=80 + dynaudnorm=p=0.9 before Vosk (removes noise, normalizes volume)
- Vosk confidence: words below 65% marked as [?word] in transcript
- LLM instructed to silently correct low-confidence words from context

title: Fix stuck 'Generating audio' on restart
notes:
- Persistent pending-TTS tracker: orphaned status messages cleaned on next startup
- try/finally around TTS block: message always edited/deleted even on exception
- join timeout fixed: 130s → 160s (piper 120s + ffmpeg 30s + margin)
- Release notes notification: plain-text fallback + title Markdown escaping

title: Increase TTS audio length (200 → 600 chars)
notes:
- TTS_MAX_CHARS raised from 200 to 600 (~25 words → ~75 words, ~7 s → ~25 s audio)
- Constant promoted to top-level config
- LLM prompt updated to allow 3-6 sentences (was 2-4)

title: Auto-detect question language for replies
notes:
- Reply language now follows: question lang > Telegram lang > Russian (default) > English (backup)
- Cyrillic-heavy text → reply in Russian; Latin-heavy → reply in English
- Default language changed to Russian (was English)
- Only supported languages (ru/en) are used for LLM replies

title: Fix picoclaw bash-lc command leaking to user
notes:
- Strip "Picoclaw:" header line from picoclaw output
- Extract text from bash -lc 'printf "..."' wrapper (picoclaw agent format)
- Users no longer see raw shell commands in voice/chat responses

title: Language enforcement + TTS emoji fix + Markdown safety
notes:
- All LLM responses forced to the user's language (Russian/English prefix injected into every prompt)
- Emoji and Unicode pictographs stripped from TTS input — Piper no longer reads "Омар" or similar at the start of voice replies
- Literal \\n in LLM output is now correctly unescaped to a newline before display
- Voice reply text uses Markdown escaping with plain-text fallback to prevent parse errors

title: Voice Pipeline Optimizations
notes:
5 optional voice latency optimizations added (all OFF by default).

Enable via Admin → ⚡ Voice Opts:
• *Silence strip* — crops silence before STT (−6s)
• *8 kHz sample rate* — lighter Vosk processing (−7s)
• *Warm Piper cache* — pre-loads TTS model at startup (−15s first call)
• *Parallel TTS thread* — TTS starts while text reply is sent (text-first UX)
• *Per-user audio toggle* — 🔇/🔊 button on every voice reply

Settings persist in `~/.picoclaw/voice_opts.json`.

title: OpenAI ChatGPT LLM Sub-menu + TTS Timeout Fix
notes:
OpenAI ChatGPT model selector with API key management.
Available models: gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, o3-mini, o1, gpt-4.5-preview.
API key saved once for all 5 models via Admin → Switch LLM → OpenAI ChatGPT.

Fixed audio timeout: Markdown stripped before TTS, char limit halved (200), timeout raised to 120s.

title: Role-based Help + /status Service Diagnostics
notes:
Three help variants: Admin / Full / Guest — each shows only relevant menu items and role badge.

/status now shows per-service status with icons (✅/❌): Telegram Bot, AI Gateway, Voice Assistant, plus active LLM model and user role.

title: i18n Infrastructure + Voice Language Announcement
notes:
Full Russian/English localisation via strings.json.
All UI strings externalised — no hard-coded text in bot code.
Voice session intro announces supported language (Vosk + Piper Irina).
LLM switcher in admin panel — persist model choice to active_model.txt.
